name: Norrheim Helmet
description: If a piece of armor is decorated with wild animals' horns, furs, and bones, then it most likely belonged to a member of the Norrheim clan, where a person's merit is based exclusively on their hunting prowess.
descriptionZh: 盔甲上面若是缀有兽皮、兽角或者兽骨，那么很多可能出自诺尔海姆的部族之手。对于他们而言，个体的地位完全取决于胆量与狩猎的能力。
